item.title: Instrument Type v1.2.2.14
item.description:
Product: Instrument Type v1.2.2.14
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Mon, 09 Mar 2026 11:24:49 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Instrument Framework Interfaces / Instrument Types

Release Notes: [1.2.2]
- Instrument/1.15.10
- #194 add other dependencies
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Instrument Framework v1.15.10.47
item.description:
Product: Instrument Framework v1.15.10.47
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Mon, 09 Mar 2026 09:02:29 -0400
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: An object-oriented framework based on JKI SMOs, developed by the LevyLab at the University of Pittsburgh.

An Instrument developed using this framework will have the access to the following capabilities:

- Framework for communicating with hardware (Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL))
- Periodically polls the instrument for its settings and logs them to a PGSQL database
- Defines an API to allow external programs to control compiled instances of the application and remotely across a network (Either NI's Simple Messaging Library (STM) (deprecated in v1.9) or cross-platform protocol ZMQ (preferred beginning with v1.9))
- Provide a user interface (optional but probably desirable).
- Methods for reading and writing configuration from disk.

Release Notes: [1.15.10]
#191 'Read SMO Address.vi' added terminal for SMO URI ('tcp://address:port')
#193 make debug mode configurable via configuration.ini (OR override from front panel)
#195 new API method 'Write SMO Address.vi'
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Instrument Framework v1.15.10.46
item.description:
Product: Instrument Framework v1.15.10.46
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Fri, 06 Mar 2026 16:13:03 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: An object-oriented framework based on JKI SMOs, developed by the LevyLab at the University of Pittsburgh.

An Instrument developed using this framework will have the access to the following capabilities:

- Framework for communicating with hardware (Hardware Abstraction Layer (HAL))
- Periodically polls the instrument for its settings and logs them to a PGSQL database
- Defines an API to allow external programs to control compiled instances of the application and remotely across a network (Either NI's Simple Messaging Library (STM) (deprecated in v1.9) or cross-platform protocol ZMQ (preferred beginning with v1.9))
- Provide a user interface (optional but probably desirable).
- Methods for reading and writing configuration from disk.

Release Notes: [1.15.10]
#191 'Read SMO Address.vi' added terminal for SMO URI ('tcp://address:port')
#193 make debug mode configurable via configuration.ini (OR override from front panel)
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: LEIDEN TC v4.61.7.12

Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Thu, 05 Mar 2026 22:02:06 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: This package tracks the build version of the TC application

- fix API handling getTemperature and getHeater
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: LEIDEN API v0.0.5.10
item.description:
Product: LEIDEN API v0.0.5.10
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Thu, 05 Mar 2026 20:00:25 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Tools used by LevyLab to interact with Leiden Cryostats

Front Panel (FP) API:
- pushButton({Start, 3He, 4He, Normal, Recovery, Auto, Reset, LED Test})
- setMode({Auto Off, Start, Condense 3He, Condense 4He, Normal Circulation, Recovery})
- getMode()

Temperature Control (TC) API:
- getTemperature()
- setHeater()
- getHeater()

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
- fix API handling getTemperature and getHeater
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: LEIDEN API v0.0.5.9
item.description:
Product: LEIDEN API v0.0.5.9
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Thu, 05 Mar 2026 19:38:09 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Tools used by LevyLab to interact with Leiden Cryostats

Front Panel (FP) API:
- pushButton({Start, 3He, 4He, Normal, Recovery, Auto, Reset, LED Test})
- setMode({Auto Off, Start, Condense 3He, Condense 4He, Normal Circulation, Recovery})
- getMode()

Temperature Control (TC) API:
- getTemperature()
- setHeater()
- getHeater()

Release Notes: - build with Remote-Control-ZMQ/1.3.6.27
- fix API handling getTemperature and getHeater
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Transport v2.3.1.43
item.description:
Product: Transport v2.3.1.43
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Mon, 02 Mar 2026 17:47:46 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: VIs for scripting and performing transport measurments.

[Control Experiment]
- Control Experiment.vi
- provides a uniform way to record information about your sample & device
- record how the lockin is connected to the device
- configure the Krohn Hite amplifier
- set the base path for saving data
- configure peripheral instruments
- APIs for recording sample data, instrument status

[Transport]
Basic transport measurments:
- Lockin vs time (Lockin_time.vi)
- Lockin Sweep Mode (Lockin_sweep.vi)

[Transport Server]
Server used for scripting and performing asynchronous transport measurments.


Release Notes: [2.3.1]
- fix an issue in which instruments would not be compared correctly on second iteration when Lockin_Sweep or Lockin_time are called as a subVI
item.dc:creator: Levylab
